_meta.description: Emission factors and calorific values for BRSR GHG Scope 1 & 2 + energy intensity calculations. India-specific.
_meta.scope1_methodology: IPCC 2006 Guidelines for National Greenhouse Gas Inventories, Volume 2 (Energy); GHG Protocol Corporate Standard
_meta.scope2_methodology: Central Electricity Authority (CEA) CO2 Baseline Database for the Indian Power Sector (location-based approach)
_meta.note: Factors use IPCC AR5 100-yr GWPs (CH4=28, N2O=265) aligned with GHG Protocol. Verify against latest CEA publication and BEE guidance each filing year. Annual upkeep of the grid factor is the consultant's responsibility.

scope2_grid.source: Central Electricity Authority, CO2 Baseline Database for the Indian Power Sector, Version 19.0 (FY 2022-23) — National Grid Emission Factor (combined margin)

scope1_fuels.label: Diesel (HSD)
scope1_fuels.source: IPCC 2006 Vol.2 Table 1.4 — CO₂: 74.1 tCO₂/TJ; NCV Table 1.2 — 43.0 MJ/kg × 0.832 kg/L. GHG Protocol Corporate Standard.

scope1_fuels.label: Petrol (MS)
scope1_fuels.source: IPCC 2006 Vol.2 Table 1.4 — CO₂: 69.3 tCO₂/TJ; NCV Table 1.2 — 44.3 MJ/kg × 0.752 kg/L. GHG Protocol.

scope1_fuels.label: CNG / Piped Natural Gas
scope1_fuels.source: IPCC 2006 Vol.2 Table 1.4 — CO₂: 56.1 tCO₂/TJ; NCV Table 1.2 — 34.3 MJ/m³ (standard conditions). GHG Protocol.

scope1_fuels.label: LPG
scope1_fuels.source: IPCC 2006 Vol.2 Table 1.4 — CO₂: 63.1 tCO₂/TJ; NCV Table 1.2 — 47.3 MJ/kg.

scope1_fuels.label: Coal (bituminous)
scope1_fuels.source: IPCC 2006 Vol.2 Table 1.4 — CO₂: 94.6 tCO₂/TJ; NCV: CEA/BEE India-average bituminous coal (26.2 MJ/kg).

scope1_fuels.label: Furnace Oil / HFO
scope1_fuels.source: IPCC 2006 Vol.2 Table 1.4 — CO₂: 77.4 tCO₂/TJ; NCV Table 1.2 — 40.19 MJ/kg × 0.950 kg/L.
